summary: Israel intensified ground and air operations in southern Lebanon, targeting over 100 Hezbollah infrastructure sites and advancing beyond the Yellow Line. Iran reported restoration of international internet connectivity and displayed short‑range AD‑08 air‑defense systems during drills in Armenia. The IRGC claimed to have tracked and forced an American F‑35 to withdraw after launching defensive missiles.
key_points: Israel launched extensive strikes on more than 100 Hezbollah targets in the Baqa'a area and across southern Lebanon, including weapons depots and command posts (Source: @almogboker78/17140).
Israeli forces moved beyond the Yellow Line in Lebanon, expanding ground maneuver and area control (Source: @pkpoi/142217).
Iran announced the re‑connection of its internet network, expecting full public access within 24 hours (Source: @asafroz/49528).
Iran displayed the short‑range AD‑08 Majid air‑defence system during exercises in Yerevan, Armenia on May 25 (Source: @naya_foriraq/76170).
The IRGC reported tracking an American F‑35 stealth fighter attempting to breach southern Iranian airspace and launching defensive missiles that forced it to flee (Source: @presstv/191505).
A drone launched by Hezbollah fell in Israeli territory near the Lebanon border without causing casualties (Source: @idf_telegram/23873).
Israel announced the possible assassination of Mohammad Odeh, Hamas’ new military leader, in the Gaza Strip (Source: @Faytuks_Network/3058).

sections.executive_summary: Israel launched extensive strikes on over 100 Hezbollah sites in southern Lebanon and moved troops beyond the Yellow Line, expanding ground control. Iran restored its internet connection and showcased new AD‑08 air‑defence systems during drills in Armenia. The IRGC claimed to have intercepted an American F‑35, forcing it to retreat after missile launch.

points: Iranian state news agency reported that the process of reconnecting to the international internet has begun, with full public availability expected within 24 hours (Source: @asafroz/49528).
Iran displayed its short‑range AD‑08 Majid air‑defence system during training exercises in Yerevan, Armenia on 25 May, highlighting new missile capabilities (Source: @naya_foriraq/76170).

The IRGC announced successful tracking of an American F‑35 stealth fighter attempting to enter southern Iranian airspace, launching defensive missiles that forced the aircraft to flee (Source: @presstv/191505).

Iranian officials warned users to update operating systems, browsers, antivirus, and banking apps immediately after internet restoration due to heightened cyber‑attack risk (Source: @SharghDaily/162203).

The IDF reported that over 100 Hezbollah terror infrastructure sites, including weapons depots, command centers, and observation posts, were struck throughout Baqa'a and southern Lebanon during night operations (Source: @almogboker78/17140).
Israeli forces have crossed the Yellow Line in Lebanon, expanding ground maneuver and establishing control over newly seized areas (Source: @pkpoi/142217).
A Hezbollah‑launched drone landed in Israeli territory near the Lebanon border without causing casualties, prompting alerts but no injuries (Source: @idf_telegram/23873).
Israel claimed to have targeted and possibly assassinated Mohammad Odeh, the new Hamas military leader and former intelligence chief, in the Gaza Strip (Source: @Faytuks_Network/3058).
The Israeli Air Force conducted a precision strike on a dam in the western Lebanese valley, as reported by field sources (Source: @lelotsenzura/92209).
Israel announced a possible targeted killing of Mohammad Odeh, Hamas’ new military commander, in the Gaza Strip (Source: @Faytuks_Network/3058).
A report from an Israeli source indicated a recent airstrike on a western Gaza structure using five missiles (Source: @pkpoi/142224).
IDF statements described a completed engineering operation destroying more than 11 km of Hamas underground tunnels in Beit Hanoun, a known Hamas stronghold (Source: @idf_telegram/23883).
Local reports mentioned ongoing attacks within the Gaza Strip, with additional strikes reported in the central sector (Source: @inon_yttach/8341).
Israeli forces attacked over 100 Hezbollah infrastructure targets in Baqa'a and across southern Lebanon, including weapons depots and command posts (Source: @almogboker78/17140).
Israel announced that its troops have moved beyond the Yellow Line, expanding ground maneuver and area control in Lebanon (Source: @pkpoi/142217).
A Hezbollah‑launched drone fell in Israeli territory near the Lebanon border without causing casualties (Source: @idf_telegram/23873).
The Israeli Air Force struck a dam in the western Lebanese valley, according to uncensored field reports (Source: @lelotsenzura/92209).
Israeli officials stated they are deepening operations in Lebanon and securing a security strip to protect northern Israeli communities (Source: @New_security8200/199959).
No explicit operational details regarding Syria or Iraq were present in the provided messages.
Iranian officials warned of cyber‑security risks following internet restoration, urging Gulf users to update software promptly (Source: @SharghDaily/162203).

Reports indicated Qatar’s involvement in diplomatic mediation between Iran and the United States over frozen Iranian funds, though claims of a $12 billion offer were denied (Source: @kianmeli1/87670).

key_developments: Israel struck over 100 Hezbollah infrastructure sites in Baqa'a and southern Lebanon, targeting weapons depots and command centers (Source: @almogboker78/17140).
Israeli forces crossed the Yellow Line in Lebanon, expanding ground maneuver and establishing control over new territories (Source: @pkpoi/142217).
Iran reconnected to the international internet, promising full public access within 24 hours (Source: @asafroz/49528).
Iran displayed the AD‑08 Majid short‑range air‑defence system during drills in Yerevan, Armenia on 25 May (Source: @naya_foriraq/76170).
The IRGC tracked an American F‑35 attempting to breach southern Iranian airspace and launched defensive missiles that forced it to retreat (Source: @presstv/191505).
A Hezbollah‑launched drone landed in Israeli territory near the Lebanon border without causing casualties (Source: @idf_telegram/23873).
Israel possibly assassinated Hamas military leader Mohammad Odeh in Gaza, according to statements by the Prime Minister and Defense Minister (Source: @Faytuks_Network/3058).
sections.threat_assessment: Hezbollah in southern Lebanon faces intensified Israeli strikes and ground incursions, reducing its operational depth and threatening its logistics networks. Iran’s rapid restoration of internet connectivity and showcase of new AD‑08 air‑defence systems indicate a focus on enhancing both cyber and short‑range air defence capabilities, potentially complicating future aerial operations. The IRGC’s claim of intercepting an American F‑35 suggests heightened vigilance and willingness to engage advanced foreign aircraft, raising the risk of direct confrontation with U.S. forces.
sections.regional_response: Israel’s cabinet and senior military leadership have publicly affirmed deepening operations in Lebanon, signaling a sustained commitment to pressure Hezbollah and secure northern Israeli borders. Iran’s public advisories on cyber‑security post‑internet restoration aim to mitigate exploitation by adversaries, while diplomatic channels involving Qatar continue to address frozen Iranian assets, reflecting ongoing regional diplomatic maneuvering. Hezbollah’s limited response, limited to a downed drone with no casualties, suggests constrained immediate retaliation.
sections.intelligence_notes: Monitoring of Hezbollah’s remaining infrastructure in southern Lebanon is critical as Israeli forces consolidate gains beyond the Yellow Line. Continued observation of Iran’s AD‑08 deployment and cyber‑security posture will inform assessments of its defensive readiness against aerial and digital threats. The reported Israeli targeting of Hamas leadership in Gaza may indicate a shift toward decapitation tactics, warranting close watch on Hamas command structures and potential retaliatory actions.
